title: golang security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.25.5-2]
- Rebase to rhel-9-main
- Related: RHEL-139366

[1.25.5-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.5 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-139366

[1.25.3-2]
- Cleanup lib/ ownership
